verbatim_quote: Now, if you have 10 times that amount, or like 100 times that amount, you will actually end up having to carry around 100 billion worth of KV cache per user.
gloss: [METRIC] Now, if you have 10 times that amount, or like 100 times that amount, you will actually end up having to carry around 100 billion worth of KV cache per user.
